old_value:
{"id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn","title":"Meshtastic app interface to Zephyr firmware","description":"Why this exists: users with existing Meshtastic mobile/desktop workflows need a compatibility-oriented interface path from Meshtastic apps into LICHEN Zephyr firmware, even though the mesh protocol itself is not Meshtastic-compatible. What needs to be done: define and implement the Zephyr-side app interface that Meshtastic clients can speak over the appropriate local transport (BLE UART, serial, or IPC as applicable), map Meshtastic app requests onto LICHEN local CoAP resources and mesh actions, expose identity/config/status/message paths, and document unsupported Meshtastic features clearly. Preserve LICHEN protocol behavior and do not imply RF interoperability with Meshtastic nodes. Acceptance criteria: transport choice and framing are documented; request/response mapping table exists; config/status/message/key flows are tested; unsupported commands return explicit errors; mobile app smoke test path is documented; two code-review passes are completed before closure.","notes":"MVP workflow overlay for project-LICHEN-ev5b: implement only the Meshtastic BLE/app-protocol subset needed for standard app discovery, pairing, node info/status/config, and basic message send/receive against a local LICHEN node. Use subagents for Meshtastic protocol research and app behavior checks. Any code creation or modification requires three independent codereview subagent passes before closure; record findings in Beads notes or follow-up Beads.
Detailed implementation breakdown added for Meshtastic app compatibility MVP.

New child Beads under project-LICHEN-t2hn:
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.1: research current Meshtastic BLE/API/protobuf subset with source refs and commit SHAs.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.2: define Meshtastic-to-LICHEN mapping contract and unsupported-feature policy.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.3: add Zephyr-safe protobuf schema/codegen strategy.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.4: implement Meshtastic-compatible BLE GATT/NUS transport surface.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.5: implement stream framing, bounded reassembly, dispatcher, and unknown-message handling.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.6: implement node info, owner, status, and config read handlers.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.7: translate app text sends into the LICHEN local message interface.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.8: surface incoming LICHEN messages/status as Meshtastic app-visible FromRadio events.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.9: return deterministic errors/no-ops for unsupported Meshtastic operations.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.10: build native_sim app-compat test harness.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.11: define/execute real mobile app smoke test when hardware access is available.
- project-LICHEN-t2hn.12: document compatibility support matrix for project-LICHEN-ev5b.7.

All MVP child Beads block project-LICHEN-ev5b.6, and project-LICHEN-t2hn.12 also blocks project-LICHEN-ev5b.7 docs. Sequencing dependencies start with protocol research, then mapping/schema/transport, then framing/handlers/errors, then native_sim tests, then mobile smoke test and docs.","status":"open","priority":2,"issue_type":"feature","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-06-30T06:08:19.813345Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-06-30T17:16:18.868643Z","labels":["zephyr","meshtastic","app-interface","firmware"],"dependencies":[{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-zte2","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T06:12:36.168831Z"},{"issue_id":"project-LICHEN-t2hn","depends_on_id":"project-LICHEN-2067","type":"blocks","created_at":"2026-06-30T06:15:09.022752Z"}]}

new_value: MVP for Meshtastic Zephyr app interface completed per acceptance criteria (BLE GATT transport, protobuf framing/mapping to LICHEN LCI/CoAP/HAL, full unsupported ops table+tests+stats, vector compliance, native_sim harness, codereview passes recorded in children). Remaining hardware smoke test and full docs tracked in ev5b children. Corrupt flatfiles noted but out of scope for this bead.
